text:
is an artbook published by GAINAX on 26 October 2001 and republished digitally by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 07 July 2020. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: Death and Rebirth.

Overview

The 2020 version includes 28 color pages that were not present in the original release. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000807/
